title: Lesson 910: お世辞, 襲う, 遅くとも...

items.gloss: to attack; to assail; to make an assault; to strike; to hunt down; to succeed (someone in a post, role, etc.); to make a sudden visit
fear; horror; anxiety; concern; uneasiness; reverence
to be sorry; to beg pardon; to be much obliged; to feel small; to be grateful; to be amazed; to be filled with awe; to be surprised; to be disconcerted; to be embarrassed
to flatter; to soft-soap; to sweet talk; to cajole; to instigate
to feel down; to feel sad; to be depressed; to be in low spirits; to be in a slump (business, economy, etc.); to be in an unfavourable condition; to fall into (e.g. a hole)
